title: Healthcare Stocks With at Least 30 Years of Dividend Increases
text: While it is not the only factor to consider, the annual dividend can solidify whether a stock will benefit you financially. And among the many industry sectors to invest in, healthcare can be one of the most stable, especially regarding the dividend yield.

title: Healthcare's Hidden Gem: West Pharmaceutical Services
text: West Pharmaceutical Services is far from small, yet still a somewhat hidden healthcare gem. This fast-growing supplier of healthcare products like syringes and deliverables benefits from multiple secular tailwinds and a big business moat.

title: The 5 Best and Worst Performing Large-Cap Stocks in February 2023
text: Investing in large-cap stocks is considered one of the best ways to invest in the stock market.

title: West Pharmaceutical: A Growing Company, But Pass On Its Declining Margin Outlook
text: WST surprisingly ended FY'22 with positive (YoY) growth. Thanks to its innovative product portfolio and capacity expansion catalyst, the management expects continued growth in its top line in FY'23.
